description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted radiator with a bold red finish, featuring a series of evenly spaced horizontal bars forming the main heat-dissipating surface. The radiator is rectangular and relatively flat, with visible mounting brackets attaching it to a light-colored wall panel. At the bottom right, there is a compact valve assembly, likely for water inlet and outlet, with visible adjustment knobs and pipe connections. The horizontal bars are tubular and arranged in parallel, providing both functional heat emission and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, likely steel, with a smooth, hard surface and a glossy paint finish.
description: A red, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal tubular bars and a visible valve assembly at the bottom right, finished in glossy metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the radiator, horizontal bars, and the valve assembly at the bottom right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's slim profile and the protruding mounting brackets and valve assembly.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the flat wall panel, with the radiator itself not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and mounting brackets, but the valve assembly is less visible.
attribute_pipe_connections: two pipe connections at the bottom right, horizontally oriented
